concepts.title: {Team} — Champions
concepts.subtitle: {Year} {Title}
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “trophy_lift.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo c1 (trophy_lift.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Signature Edition centers it with symmetrical balance and expansive whitespace, framed with restraint in #C9A84C on #0C0E14 — timeless, so this championship still feels right in ten years. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: victory. Capture the roar of victory and the unity that earned it.
concepts.purchasePsychology: The version most families choose — timeless and universally loved. A natural centerpiece for a championship celebration. Recommended as a Standard print. Made for the team, players, and their families. (championship)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Central hero with a disciplined supporting grid

colorRecipe.guidance: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline
typographyRecipe.guidance: Classic, confident hierarchy; distance- and print-readable.

sharePreview.headline: Capture the roar of victory and the unity that earned it.
sharePreview.caption: I can’t believe this came from our photos. 😮
sharePreview.altText: A Signature Edition CelebrateBanner championship design, centered on the chosen hero photo with 3 supporting photos.

concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “trophy_lift.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo c1 (trophy_lift.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Luxury Gold lifts it into a cinematic spotlight with luxurious negative space and gold framing in #C9A84C, so the championship feels as big as it was. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: victory. Capture the roar of victory and the unity that earned it.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Best displayed as a framed keepsake; the gold reads richest at a large size, so it looks strongest at 24×36. Recommended as a Framed. Made for the team, players, and their families. (championship)

colorRecipe.guidance: Gold-forward on deep obsidian with glow accents on the hero — radiant metallic, never flooded.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: large Cormorant Garamond in gold gradient
typographyRecipe.guidance: Formal and radiant; the most decorative type voice, still restrained.

concepts.title: {Team} — Champions

concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “trophy_lift.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo c1 (trophy_lift.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Modern Editorial gives it magazine-cover scale and deliberate asymmetry, with bold negative space and strong type — the championship, styled like a cover. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: victory. Capture the roar of victory and the unity that earned it.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Made to share — it looks strongest on a phone screen and social feed before it ever reaches a wall. Recommended as a Digital download. Made for the team, players, and their families. (championship)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Editorial asymmetry with an oversized hero

colorRecipe.guidance: Sharpest contrast, a single disciplined accent; gold as highlight only.

typographyRecipe.labelTreatment: bold sans labels; refined serif accent
typographyRecipe.guidance: Type as composition; strong scale contrast, magazine-grade.
